description_long: This is a stone obelisk monument with a square base and a tapered shaft, topped by a pyramidal cap. The structure is composed of several stacked sections, each with clean, sharp edges and a smooth, matte finish. The front face features engraved inscriptions, with the name 'BOGGS' prominently displayed on the lower section, and additional text above it. The base is multi-tiered, with a broad, rectangular footprint and a slightly raised platform. The monument is primarily light gray in color, with some darker weathering visible on certain surfaces. There are no visible decorative motifs aside from the inscriptions, giving the obelisk a solemn and dignified appearance.
description: A light gray stone obelisk monument with a square, tiered base and engraved inscriptions, topped by a pyramidal cap. The design is simple and dignified, with the name 'BOGGS' clearly visible on the front.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main inscription panel and the clean, tiered base.
description_view_1: Side view with the 'BOGGS' nameplate and additional inscription panel visible, showing some weathering.
description_view_2: Rear view with a plain surface and no visible inscriptions or ornamentation.
description_view_3: Side view with a secondary inscription panel and the stepped base clearly visible.
attribute_inscription: Engraved inscriptions are present on the front and one side, with the name 'BOGGS' in large block letters on the lower front section and additional text above in a serif style. The inscriptions are in English and are moderately legible.
attribute_base_design: The base is multi-tiered and square, with three distinct levels. The lowest tier is broad and rectangular, supporting a slightly smaller middle tier, and a final upper tier that transitions into the shaft. The base is plain, with no decorative carvings.
attribute_tip_design: The tip is a simple pyramidal capstone, smooth and unadorned, matching the rest of the monument in material and finish.
